001package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.service.respository;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.CollectedFossil;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.Fossil;
006import java.util.List;
007import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
008
009/**
010 * Repository interface for managing collected fossil data. Provides asynchronous and observable
011 * methods for retrieving, inserting, and updating collected fossils.
012 */
013public interface CollectedFossilRepository {
014
015  /**
016   * Retrieves all collected fossils for a specific user, ordered by collection date (newest
017   * first) as observable live data.
018   *
019   * @param userId User ID.
020   * @return LiveData containing list of collected fossils ordered by date.
021   */
022  LiveData<List<CollectedFossil>> getAllOrderByDateCollectedDesc(long userId);
023
024  /**
025   * Retrieves collected fossils for a specific user filtered by favorite status and ordered by
026   * collection date (newest first) as observable live data.
027   *
028   * @param userId User ID.
029   * @param favorite Whether to retrieve favorite or non-favorite fossils.
030   * @return LiveData containing list of collected fossils matching the favorite status, ordered by
031   *     date.
032   */
033  LiveData<List<CollectedFossil>> getAllByFavoriteStateOrderByDateCollectedDesc(long userId, boolean favorite);
034
035  /**
036   * Inserts a new collected fossil into the database asynchronously.
037   *
038   * @param collectedFossil Collected fossil to insert.
039   * @return CompletableFuture containing the generated primary key ID.
040   */
041  CompletableFuture<Long> insert(CollectedFossil collectedFossil);
042
043  /**
044   * Associates a fossil type with a collected fossil asynchronously.
045   *
046   * @param collectedFossil Collected fossil to update.
047   * @param fossil Fossil type to associate.
048   * @return CompletableFuture containing {@code true} if update was successful, {@code false}
049   *     otherwise.
050   */
051  CompletableFuture<Boolean> setFossil(CollectedFossil collectedFossil, Fossil fossil);
052
053  /**
054   * Updates the favorite status of a collected fossil asynchronously.
055   *
056   * @param collectedFossil Collected fossil to update.
057   * @param favoriteState New favorite status.
058   * @return CompletableFuture containing {@code true} if update was successful, {@code false}
059   *     otherwise.
060   */
061  CompletableFuture<Boolean> setFavoriteState(CollectedFossil collectedFossil,
062      boolean favoriteState);
063
064  /**
065   * Retrieves all collected fossils for a specific user that don't have associated fossil stats
066   * yet, asynchronously.
067   *
068   * @param userId User ID.
069   * @return CompletableFuture containing list of collected fossils without fossil stats.
070   */
071  CompletableFuture<List<CollectedFossil>> getAllWithoutFossil(long userId);
072}
